channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: Cars may get messy. 😬 #UKWeather #SaharanDust #Sunset #BBCNews
item.description: Cars may get messy. 😬 #UKWeather #SaharanDust #Sunset #BBCNews

item.title: Last December up to 16,000 homes went without water for almost a week, while in January about 30,000 properties faced issues. #SouthEastWater #Regulator #Water #England #Sussex #Kent #BBCNews
item.description: Last December up to 16,000 homes went without water for almost a week, while in January about 30,000 properties faced issues. #SouthEastWater #Regulator #Water #England #Sussex #Kent #BBCNews

item.title: Cuba has been hit by a wave of power cuts in recent years, but chronic fuel shortages have been worsened by a US blockade on oil from key ally Venezuela since January. #Cuba #Blackout #US #Venezuela #BBCNews
item.description: Cuba has been hit by a wave of power cuts in recent years, but chronic fuel shortages have been worsened by a US blockade on oil from key ally Venezuela since January. #Cuba #Blackout #US #Venezuela #BBCNews

item.title: Nearly all airspace in the Middle East has been closed following the United States-Israeli attacks on Iran. A second flight directly to Dublin from Dubai is scheduled for Thursday. #Dublin #Dubai #Ireland #UAE #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: Nearly all airspace in the Middle East has been closed following the United States-Israeli attacks on Iran. A second flight directly to Dublin from Dubai is scheduled for Thursday. #Dublin #Dubai #Ireland #UAE #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Elon Musk told a court in San Francisco that he was "simply speaking my mind" when posting on Twitter in the run up to him buying the platform. Investors have accused him of trying to manipulate markets. #ElonMusk #Twitter #SanFrancisco #News #BBCNews
item.description: Elon Musk told a court in San Francisco that he was "simply speaking my mind" when posting on Twitter in the run up to him buying the platform. Investors have accused him of trying to manipulate markets. #ElonMusk #Twitter #SanFrancisco #News #BBCNews

item.title: In Iran, blasts have again been reported in the capital Tehran while there have been more deadly Israeli air strikes in Lebanon. #Israel #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: In Iran, blasts have again been reported in the capital Tehran while there have been more deadly Israeli air strikes in Lebanon. #Israel #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Lebanese media reported last night that three people had been killed and six others injured after two strikes near the capital. New strikes were reported in southern Beirut - a Hezbollah stronghold - this morning. Israel earlier said it hit "several comma
item.description: Lebanese media reported last night that three people had been killed and six others injured after two strikes near the capital. New strikes were reported in southern Beirut - a Hezbollah stronghold - this morning. Israel earlier said it hit "several comma

item.title: The chartered flight was meant to leave Muscat International Airport in Oman at 23:00 local time on Wednesday, but remains grounded. #Oman #Muscat #MiddleEast #UKGovernment #News #BBCNews
item.description: The chartered flight was meant to leave Muscat International Airport in Oman at 23:00 local time on Wednesday, but remains grounded. #Oman #Muscat #MiddleEast #UKGovernment #News #BBCNews

item.title: London's Metropolitan Police have not done enough to protect women and girls in the five years since the murder of Sarah Everard, Baroness Louise Casey said. #SarahEverard #Women #WomensSafety #WomenandGirls #MetPolice #BBCNews
item.description: London's Metropolitan Police have not done enough to protect women and girls in the five years since the murder of Sarah Everard, Baroness Louise Casey said. #SarahEverard #Women #WomensSafety #WomenandGirls #MetPolice #BBCNews

item.title: A fifth of the world's oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow waterway wedged between Iran and the United Arab Emirates, but traffic has almost entirely halted since the start of the US-Israel war with Iran. #Israel #Iran #US #StraitOfHo
item.description: A fifth of the world's oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow waterway wedged between Iran and the United Arab Emirates, but traffic has almost entirely halted since the start of the US-Israel war with Iran. #Israel #Iran #US #StraitOfHo

item.title: “We will not stop until our people are safe”, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says. #KeirStarmer #Oman #Iran #US #Israel #Repatriation #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: “We will not stop until our people are safe”, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says. #KeirStarmer #Oman #Iran #US #Israel #Repatriation #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: The UK is sending four additional Typhoon fighter jets to join Britain's squadron in Qatar in the wake of US-Israel strikes on Iran, PM Keir Starmer said. #RAF #Aviation #Iran #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: The UK is sending four additional Typhoon fighter jets to join Britain's squadron in Qatar in the wake of US-Israel strikes on Iran, PM Keir Starmer said. #RAF #Aviation #Iran #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: The singer appeared to have deleted her Instagram account on Thursday as news of her arrest broke. #Britney #BritneySpears #USNews #CelebrityNews #California #BBCNews
item.description: The singer appeared to have deleted her Instagram account on Thursday as news of her arrest broke. #Britney #BritneySpears #USNews #CelebrityNews #California #BBCNews

item.title: Spring feels like it has sprung in the UK. 🥵 #Sun #UKWeather #Forecast #BBCNews
item.description: Spring feels like it has sprung in the UK. 🥵 #Sun #UKWeather #Forecast #BBCNews

item.title: Al Fayed died in 2023 aged 94 having never faced charges. He owned Harrods between 1985 and 2010, with most of the alleged abuse said to have happened during that time. The Met has said that the live investigation into those who could have facilitated or
item.description: Al Fayed died in 2023 aged 94 having never faced charges. He owned Harrods between 1985 and 2010, with most of the alleged abuse said to have happened during that time. The Met has said that the live investigation into those who could have facilitated or

item.title: The conflict in the Middle East could continue "for some time”, the UK prime minister has warned. #MiddleEast #Iran #UK #Politics #BBCNews
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East could continue "for some time”, the UK prime minister has warned. #MiddleEast #Iran #UK #Politics #BBCNews

item.title: Speaking about his former fellow One Direction band member Liam Payne, Harry Styles said he “saw someone with the kindest heart who just wanted to be great”. #HarryStyles #LiamPayne #OneDirection #ZaneLowe #News #BBCNews
item.description: Speaking about his former fellow One Direction band member Liam Payne, Harry Styles said he “saw someone with the kindest heart who just wanted to be great”. #HarryStyles #LiamPayne #OneDirection #ZaneLowe #News #BBCNews

item.title: Firefighters rescued the wolf from a canal in San Giovanni Lupatoto in northern Italy before handing it over to veterinarians for care, ahead of an anticipated release into the wild. #Veneto #Wolf #Italy #News #BBCNews
item.description: Firefighters rescued the wolf from a canal in San Giovanni Lupatoto in northern Italy before handing it over to veterinarians for care, ahead of an anticipated release into the wild. #Veneto #Wolf #Italy #News #BBCNews

item.title: Kristi Noem, who has led Trump's immigration drive, will be replaced with Republican Senator Markwayne Mullin, Trump says. #DonaldTrump #KristiNoem #Immigration #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Kristi Noem, who has led Trump's immigration drive, will be replaced with Republican Senator Markwayne Mullin, Trump says. #DonaldTrump #KristiNoem #Immigration #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump has announced he is replacing Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, who has led his immigration drive. #DonaldTrump #KristiNoem #Immigration #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced he is replacing Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, who has led his immigration drive. #DonaldTrump #KristiNoem #Immigration #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Polls in Israel suggest almost a consensus among Israeli Jews in favour of the US-Israel war with Iran. #Israel #Iran #US #TelAviv #BBCNews
item.description: Polls in Israel suggest almost a consensus among Israeli Jews in favour of the US-Israel war with Iran. #Israel #Iran #US #TelAviv #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump said "we don't want anything to do with Spain" and threatened to impose a full trade embargo on the country in response to Spain's refusal to allow the US to use the jointly-run bases at Morón and Rotafor to strike Iran. #Preside
item.description: US President Donald Trump said "we don't want anything to do with Spain" and threatened to impose a full trade embargo on the country in response to Spain's refusal to allow the US to use the jointly-run bases at Morón and Rotafor to strike Iran. #Preside

item.title: St Piran's Day has turned into a day of Cornish pride, celebrated with food, music and events across the country. #StPiransDay #Cornwall #Kernow #Pasties #BBCNews
item.description: St Piran's Day has turned into a day of Cornish pride, celebrated with food, music and events across the country. #StPiransDay #Cornwall #Kernow #Pasties #BBCNews

item.title: On Thursday, Republican leadership in Congress said Tony Gonzales should end his re-election campaign. #TonyGozales #Texas #Congress #Senate #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: On Thursday, Republican leadership in Congress said Tony Gonzales should end his re-election campaign. #TonyGozales #Texas #Congress #Senate #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The footage can be used to support investigations and deter future incidents, an NHS trust said. #Hospital #NHS #BodyCam #Manchester #BBCNews
item.description: The footage can be used to support investigations and deter future incidents, an NHS trust said. #Hospital #NHS #BodyCam #Manchester #BBCNews

item.title: The US and Iran haven’t had formal diplomatic relations for more than 40 years, with their embassies closed since the 1979 revolution and hostage crisis. After a new war and the killing of Iran’s supreme leader, what happens next? #Iran #US #Politics #BBC
item.description: The US and Iran haven’t had formal diplomatic relations for more than 40 years, with their embassies closed since the 1979 revolution and hostage crisis. After a new war and the killing of Iran’s supreme leader, what happens next? #Iran #US #Politics #BBC

item.title: Kristi Noem will be replaced by Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin at the end of the month, according to US President Donald Trump. #KristiNoem #DonaldTrump #Immigration #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Kristi Noem will be replaced by Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin at the end of the month, according to US President Donald Trump. #KristiNoem #DonaldTrump #Immigration #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Texas Republican congressman Tony Gonzales has dropped his re-election bid after admitting an affair, which he had previously denied, with a staff member who died by suicide. #US #Congress #Texas #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Texas Republican congressman Tony Gonzales has dropped his re-election bid after admitting an affair, which he had previously denied, with a staff member who died by suicide. #US #Congress #Texas #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: Lionel Messi, owner Jorge Mas, and members of the Inter Miami team visited the White House to celebrate their 2025 Major League Soccer Cup victory. #PresidentTrump #Messi #InterMiami #Football #BBCNews
item.description: Lionel Messi, owner Jorge Mas, and members of the Inter Miami team visited the White House to celebrate their 2025 Major League Soccer Cup victory. #PresidentTrump #Messi #InterMiami #Football #BBCNews

item.title: Four men arrested on suspicion of aiding Iran's intelligence service by spying on the Jewish community in London, Metropolitan Police say. The investigation relates to the suspected surveillance of locations and individuals linked to Jewish communities in
item.description: Four men arrested on suspicion of aiding Iran's intelligence service by spying on the Jewish community in London, Metropolitan Police say. The investigation relates to the suspected surveillance of locations and individuals linked to Jewish communities in
